mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user_account u WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.phone, u.role_name, r.permissions, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted FROM sys_user_account u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.deleted = 0 AND (r.role_code = u.role_name OR r.name = u.role_name) WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.phone, u.role_name, r.permissions, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted FROM sys_user_account u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.deleted = 0 AND (r.role_code = u.role_name OR r.name = u.role_name) WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.phone, u.role_name, r.permissions, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted FROM sys_user_account u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.deleted = 0 AND (r.role_code = u.role_name OR r.name = u.role_name) WHERE u.phone = #{phone} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_account (username, password, name, phone, role_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{roleName}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user_account
username = #{username}, password = #{password}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, role_name = #{roleName}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
